privileged_info_summary: The task operates on Odoo 17 Community Edition using the official demo dataset. Target employee 'Eli Lambert' is a verified member of Odoo's 20-employee demo data and belongs to the Research & Development department. The onboarding plan 'New Employee Onboarding' is to be created with exactly 4 activity templates: (1) 'Set up workstation and IT accounts' (coach), (2) 'Complete new hire paperwork' (employee), (3) 'Schedule orientation meeting' (manager), and (4) 'Assign onboarding buddy' (coach). All responsible_type values (coach, manager, employee) are valid, standard Odoo role-based assignment options confirmed through Odoo documentation and are consistently used throughout the task verifier logic.
